violations.text: Ice cream cones were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

A bag of French fries were observed in the hand-washing sink near the 3-bay sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. French fries were relocated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023

Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
Ice cream cones were observed stored on the floor near the service window. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

The ice scoop in the ice well below soda dispenser was observed stored with the handle touching the ice. Utensils must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
Single-service articles (disposable cups) were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
